focused_output: The record proved the decomposition only for revision aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.
Revision bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb changes a load-bearing dependency, so the subject-revision-unchanged validity condition no longer holds.
Patching the old record cannot make its verdict current; the decomposition must be re-derived against revision bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb before consumption.
